learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate knowledge of the specific topic area.

assessments.weighting: <dd>100% Total marks divided into different types of assessments, as will be specified by the supervising staff member </dd>
assessments.due_date: Due dates will be advised by the supervising staff member.
assessments.category: Paper/ Report/ Annotation, Presentation, Project, Quiz, Tutorial/ Problem Set
assessments.task_description:
Assessments will be specified by the supervising staff member.

Assessment items may include the following: problem sets, literature surveys, seminars, exams, etc.

The assessment items will be such that none will exceed 60% of the 100% mark, and at least 30% of the course assessment will be secure assessment.
assessments.submission_guidelines: To be advised by the supervising staff member.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.
assessments.additional_info: You cannot defer or apply for an extension for this assessment.
